title: Software Update - DFU - Entering airplane mode during update
scenario: DFU fails with "Houston..." error when airplane mode is enabled during early update progress, then recovers and completes after retry
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the device's settings page.
2. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the connected Poly audio device.
3. During the early update progress (0–20% for speakerphone devices, or 0–10% for headset + charge case/stand simultaneous updates), enable Airplane Mode on the mobile device.
4. Wait for the update to fail and observe the app screen.
5. Disable Airplane Mode on the mobile device.
6. On the 'Houston...' error screen, tap the 'Retry' button.
expected: After enabling Airplane Mode during early DFU progress, the update should fail and a "Houston..." error page should be displayed. After turning off Airplane Mode and tapping "Retry," the update should restart and complete successfully.
